data.title: Write RED test for rebase detection in review-complexity-classifier.sh
data.description:
## Description

Add 1 test function to tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh:

1. test_classifier_detects_rebase_commit: Create git repo (mktemp -d, trap cleanup). Set MOCK_REBASE_HEAD=1 env var (matching existing MOCK_MERGE_HEAD pattern at line 442-443). Run the classifier. Parse JSON output and assert is_merge_commit == true. This reuses the existing is_merge_commit field (not a new is_rebase_commit field) because downstream consumers (REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md) read is_merge_commit specifically.

IMPORTANT: Assert on is_merge_commit field being true, NOT a new is_rebase_commit field.

## TDD Requirement
Test FAILS (RED) — _is_merge_commit() only checks MERGE_HEAD, not REBASE_HEAD.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] At least 1 new rebase test function
  Verify: grep -c "test_classifier_detects_rebase" tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 1)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q 'review-complexity-classifier.*test_classifier_detects_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
